title: Day Trip to Krka from Split | Private Transfer, Fixed €290 | TAXI Antonio
description: Private round-trip taxi transfer to Krka from Split. Fixed €290 per car, up to 4 passengers, door-to-door from Split hotels, the cruise port and the old town. Not a tour, just the ride there and back.
keywords: day trip to krka from split, round trip transfer to krka from split, taxi to krka from split, krka from split, split to krka national park

schema.name: Private Day Trip to Krka from Split
schema.description: A private day trip to Krka National Park from Split with a local English-speaking driver. Fixed price of 290 euros per car for up to 4 passengers, with door-to-door pickup at Split hotels, the cruise port, the bus and train station and the old town.

offers.description: Private vehicle, round trip Split to Krka National Park, up to 4 passengers. Park entrance tickets not included.

mainEntity.name: Is this a guided tour or a taxi transfer?

acceptedAnswer.text: It is a taxi transfer, not a guided tour. Antonio is a local driver providing a private round-trip transfer from Split to Krka and back. You get the car and the driving; inside the park you are free to explore on your own, at your own pace.

mainEntity.name: How much is a taxi to Krka from Split?

acceptedAnswer.text: A private round-trip transfer from Split to Krka National Park is a fixed 290 euros per car for up to 4 passengers, with tolls, fuel and around 3 to 4 hours of waiting time included.

mainEntity.name: Do you pick up from Split hotels and the cruise port?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. I pick up door to door from Split hotels and apartments, the old town, the bus and train station, and directly at the Split cruise port and ferry terminal, with a name sign on request.

mainEntity.name: How long does the day trip from Split to Krka take?

acceptedAnswer.text: The drive is around one hour to one hour and fifteen minutes each way, plus about 3 to 4 hours of free time inside the park. A shorter or longer stay can be agreed when you book.

mainEntity.name: How do I book and pay for the day trip?

acceptedAnswer.text: A 20% advance payment (minimum 20 euros) confirms the booking, by bank transfer or card, and you get an invoice as confirmation. The balance is paid to the driver on the day, in cash or by card.
